subcodes.first_line: O true friend! For some time no letter or message, no query or greeting, hath been received from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی مدتیست که از شما نه نامه و پیامی و نه پرسشی و سلامی در قران
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
